creator: robak@freebsd.org
text: This is not exactly how the update should look like - there are issues with it requiring bash, git, not deprecating etcdctl port and so on, so I am denying this update. However, I've update in the works on phabricator and I am talking with upstream to get rid of few linux-isms first, so that our port could be simplified, hold on, its coming soon!
